message:
🐛 fix: add acmm to enabled dashboards + address Copilot review (#8468) (#8475)

Add acmm and multi-tenancy to the kubestellar project dashboard preset
in projects.go so the ACMM sidebar route is not filtered out when
CONSOLE_PROJECT=kubestellar. Also document the intentional migration
behavior in useSidebarConfig.ts where new DEFAULT_PRIMARY_NAV entries
are appended to existing stored configs.

Fixes #8468

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
